titleStmt.title: SII 9.115: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 115. (A.R. No. 201 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE AT NANDI-BEVURU, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 976, Jaya, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, Ādivāra corresponding to A.D. 1054 December 24 Saturday (not Sunday) the day of the Uttarāyaṇa. It refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Trailōkyamalladēva and mentions his feudatory, Trailōkyamalla-Noḷamba-Pallava-Permānaḍidēva, as ruling over • • • fivehundred, Kadambaḷige thousand, Ballakunde • • • Kaṇiyakallu three-hundred and Noḷambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand. It records that Jagadēkamalla-Noḷamba-Brahmādirāja Gaṭṭiyarasa, the Uroḍeya Sivamayya, and the hundred and twenty Mahājanas assembled together and made, with the consent of the five ministers of the Noḷamba chief Narasiṅghadēva, a gift of some land to the Jaina teacher Ashṭōpavāsi-Bhaḷāra for the basadi constructed by them. In the record on the other face of the stone, a dēhāra at Bēhūru is said to have been made and given by Narasiṁghadēva to the same teacher who is said to have belonged to the Mūla-saṅgha Dēśiga-gaṇa and Pottaga-gachchha. The writer was Vāvaṇayya and the mason Rāchōja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
gaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ jīyā
jinasāsanaṁ . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī
rājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattrailōkyama
jyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddha
rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire svasti samadhi
śabda pallavānvayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ pa
nēkavākyaṁ kāṁcīpuravarēśvaraṁ śrī
kyamallanoḷaṁbapallavapermmānaḍidēva
ynūṟuṁ kadaṁbaḷige sāsiramuṁ ballakuṁde
ṇiyakallu mūnūṟuṁ modalāgi no
mūvattircchāsiramumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭa
nadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatpādapadmō
samastarājyabharanirūpitamahāmā
vīvirājamānamānōnnataprabhumaṁtrōtsāhaśakti
sampannaṁ nāmādisamastaprasostisahitaṁ śrīmadda
kaṁ jagadēkamallanoḷaṁba brahmādirājapramukhakaraṇa
sāmantagaruḍaṁ kontavidyādharaṁ manneyavallabhapādapaṁ
bhramaranappa kōgaḷināḍa manneyaṁ saucāṁjanēyaṁ sa
dhēyanenisida ghaṭṭiyarasar Iṟivanoḷaṁbanāra
ghadēvara paṁcapradhānaranumatadoḷ svasti samasta
guṇasaṁpannarappa śrīmadūroḍeya sivāmayyana
māḷimayyanu maruḷimayyama nāraṇamayya
varmmodalāgi nūṟirppadiṁbaru sakavariśa 976
ya jayasaṁvatsaraduttarāyaṇaśaṁkrānti Ādivāra
du dēsigaṇada Aṣṭōpavāsibhaḷararge tamma māḍisida
sadige dhārāpūrvvakaṁ koṭṭa bhūmi . kaṁda . Ittarkkeyyaṁ
nīrmmattaranaynūru baḷḷiyaḷaviya tōṁṭaṁ mattaydu
ḷagarddeyanittarmaneyaydanūṁdu gāṇamaninitaṁ .
Inituṁ bādhāvirahitameniśire bēhūra vipramukhyarkko
ṭṭarjjinapūjegaṣṭupāsadamunige mahāguṇige caṁdra
tāraṁbaregaṁ . priyadindiṁtidaneydekāva puruśaṁgāyuṁ
mahāśrīyumakke Idaṁ kāyade kāyva pāpige kurukṣē
traṁgaḷoḷ vāṇarāsiyoḷeḷkōṭi munīṁdraraṁ kavileyaṁ
vēdāḍhyaraṁ koṁdadoṁdayasaṁ sārggumenutte sāṟidapu
dī śaiḷākṣaraṁ brājiyoḷ . maṁgaḷaṁ .

śrīnārasiṅghadēvana datti .
paramaśrījainamārgaprakaṭitamahimā
kāraraudāryarī saṁsaraṇāṁbhōrāsiyindaṁ po
ṟamaḍuva sukhōpāyamaṁ tōṟi jainōtkara
maṁ kāruṇyadiṁdaṁ naḍeyisuva guṇa jigar
mūlasaṁgābharaṇar dēsigagaṇar pottagevaḷi
sarvvaśāstrapravīṇar . kaṁtumadāvahar sakaḷa
dayāpararudgha bōdharatyaṁtatapōmayarjjinama
rāriyadēvadvaparyyaṁtaravargge śisyarakhiḷāgā
gavīraṇaṁdisiddhāntigareṁdeḍēvogaḷvadunnatiyaṁ mā
rirvvaraṁ . Aṣṭōpavāsimunipatigaṣṭamahā
hāryavibhavaṁgaruhugaṣṭavidhakarmmara
ṣṭavidhārcananimittameṁdidanittar .
vinayasatyasaucaprayuktanaskhaḷitavittanu
ttaṁ priyavacanaṁ śiṣṭadīnāśrayanenisidana
ṇaviśāḷaṁ māḷaṁ bēhūroḷ munnāruṁ dēhā
māḍareṁdu tāṁ māḍisidaṁ sāhasaniḷayaṁ
dēhāramanaṣṭupāsimunipatigitta . Aṁdajjiyabbega
ra sthāna . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhissaga
dibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya ta
sya tadā phaḷaṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasēturnri
pāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvā
nētān bhāvinaḥ pārtthivēndrān bhūyō bhū
yō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . svadattaṁ pa
radattaṁ vā yō harētē vasuṁdharā śaṣṭi rvva
riśasahaśrāṇi mi ṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kri
miḥ . vāvaṇayyana barepa . rā
cōjana sīghralikhita maṁgaḷa .
manneya sāmyadalappuda sō
śrīdaraṇege biṭṭu koṭṭar .
Digital edition of SII 9.115 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
